resources.string: APK离线加固工具 - 支持DEX加密/VMP虚拟化/签名校验/环境检测\n适用于Android应用安全保护与逆向工程研究
APK离线加固工具 - 支持DEX加密/VMP虚拟化/签名校验/环境检测\n适用于Android应用安全保护与逆向工程研究

安卓加固 3.0
一款开源的APK离线保护工具
支持DEX整体加密、VMP代码抽取、多层签名校验
适用于Android安全学习与合法应用保护
本工具仅供Android安全学习、应用保护研究与个人合法项目使用\n请勿用于任何非法目的
兼容性未经全面测试，不保证对所有应用有效\n推荐Android 8.0及以上系统

更新日志:
1. 全新品牌重塑，UI/UX全面优化
2. VMP多层加密算法升级
3. 环境检测增强(ROOT/分身/调试器)
4. 企业加固伪装功能
5. 性能优化与稳定性提升
Debug Mode\nTemporary files will be preserved when enabled.
Auto Sign\nEnables signature verification after protection.
Use Custom JKS Certificate\nEnabled: Use custom certificate.\nDisabled: Use built-in certificate.
JKS certificate path cannot be empty.
JKS certificate file does not exist.
Clear the custom stub class name?
Invalid SO name. Only letters, numbers, and underscores are allowed. Do not include the "lib" prefix or the ".so" suffix.

The custom stub class name is invalid.

Example:
com.apk.guard.safe.StubApp

Rules:
1. Must include both a package name and a class name.
2. Each segment must not start with a number.
3. Only letters, numbers, underscores (_), and $ are allowed.
4. Empty segments are not allowed.
The output directory is invalid or not writable.
The output directory cannot be located inside the cache directory.
Please select a preset SO name.
This tool requires file access permission to read and process APK files.\n\nPlease tap "Grant Permission" to continue.
File access permission was not granted.

The current output path is located inside the temporary working directory. If you continue using it, the protected APK will be deleted when the temporary files are cleaned up.\n\nPlease change the output path first.
The APK has been protected successfully. Do you want to install it now?
The APK has been protected successfully, but it was not signed. Please sign it manually before installing.
启用VMP代码抽取\n可能导致受保护应用闪退
强制隐藏保护特征\n清除构建后所有保护标识信息
